task_completion.description: The DHIS2 Maps application is opened in the web browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows the DHIS2 interface with the Maps application active.

task_completion.description: The map is named 'Penta3 Coverage and Facilities Sierra Leone 2023'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Penta3 Coverage and Facilities Sierra Leone 2023' is visible as the map title in the DHIS2 interface (e.g., in the top title bar or save dialog).

task_completion.description: A thematic layer for Penta 3 coverage/doses by District for 2023 is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a layer in the DHIS2 Maps interface (left panel or legend) that includes 'Penta 3' (or Penta/DPT), with the organization unit set to 'District' and the period set to '2023'. The map canvas should display colored regions representing districts.

task_completion.description: A contextual layer (facilities or comparative indicator) is added to the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an additional layer in the DHIS2 Maps interface (left panel or legend) that represents either 'Facilities' (showing point markers on the map) or a comparative indicator like 'Measles' or 'BCG'.

task_completion.description: The map is exported as an image and saved to the Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the map was exported as an image (e.g., clicking 'Download' -> 'Image' in DHIS2) and saved to `/home/ga/Downloads/`. This could be a browser download popup, a file manager window, or a terminal `ls` command showing the image file in that directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DHIS2 web interface to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the DHIS2 web GUI to add layers and configure the map, rather than using terminal commands to forge an image.

integrity.description: The map displays genuine DHIS2 data and UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map should show a genuine geographical layout of Sierra Leone districts with DHIS2 UI elements (menus, legends, layer lists), not a generic or manually drawn image.

integrity.description: The exported image visually matches the map created in the DHIS2 interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the exported image is visible, it should contain the exact layers, colors, and layout configured in the DHIS2 web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with a real DHIS2 instance containing Sierra Leone health data. The map must have exactly the name 'Penta3 Coverage and Facilities Sierra Leone 2023'. It requires at least two layers: 1) a thematic layer for Penta-3 (Pentavalent 3rd dose) by District for 2023, and 2) a contextual layer (e.g., facilities, Measles, BCG). The final output must be an exported image saved in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.
